note: Brute-forcing directories and files on a web server.

recommendations.name: directory-list-2.3-medium.txt
recommendations.when: The default. Good size-to-coverage balance for a first directory pass. (Also at /usr/share/wordlists/dirbuster/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt via the dirbuster package.)

recommendations.name: raft-medium-directories.txt
recommendations.when: Real-world dirs harvested from live sites — great complement to the list above.

recommendations.name: common.txt
recommendations.when: Small and quick. Use for a fast sanity sweep before going big.

note: Hunting specific files, source leaks and forgotten backups.

recommendations.name: raft-medium-files.txt
recommendations.when: File names rather than directories — pair with -e for extensions.

recommendations.name: web-extensions.txt
recommendations.when: Feed to ffuf -e to append .php, .bak, .old and friends.

note: Password lists for spraying and brute-forcing.

recommendations.name: rockyou.txt
recommendations.when: The classic 14M-line leak. Default for offline cracking and broad brute force. Ships gzipped on Kali & Parrot — run: sudo gunzip /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt.gz

recommendations.name: fasttrack.txt
recommendations.when: Tiny curated set of common defaults — quick win on a first spray.

recommendations.name: darkweb2017_top-10000.txt
recommendations.when: Top 10k real-world passwords. Sweet spot when rockyou is too slow.

note: Account names for user enumeration and login brute force.

recommendations.name: top-usernames-shortlist.txt
recommendations.when: Seventeen of the most common accounts — start here before going wide.

recommendations.name: xato-net-10-million-usernames.txt
recommendations.when: Huge real-world username corpus when the shortlist comes up empty.

note: Discovering virtual hosts and DNS subdomains.

recommendations.name: subdomains-top1million-5000.txt
recommendations.when: Fast 5k list — the right default for vhost / subdomain fuzzing.

recommendations.name: bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt
recommendations.when: Step up to 100k when the 5k list is exhausted.

note: Fuzzing GET/POST parameter names and API objects.

recommendations.name: burp-parameter-names.txt
recommendations.when: Default for parameter-name fuzzing (hidden params, debug flags).

recommendations.name: api/objects.txt
recommendations.when: Common REST object/endpoint names for API enumeration.
